---
title: 'Ice Storm Closes the Fort Worth Area'
date: '2015-02-23T12:44:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5588615907724761926'
blogger_filename: '/2015/02/ice-storm-closes-fort-worth-area.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
---

<div class="temp">
27<sup>°</sup>
                        </div>
<div class="temp">
RealFeel: <strong>8<sup>°</sup></strong>
                        </div>
<div class="text">
Wintry precip.</div>
<div class="button">
<a href="http://www.accuweather.com/en/us/fort-worth-tx/76104/hourly-weather-forecast/351196?partner=abp_fox_dallas" target="_blank">Hourly Forecast</a>
                        </div>
<table><tbody>
<tr>
                                <td class="d1">Sunrise: 7:05 am</td>
                                <td class="d2">Wind: N 16mph</td>
                            </tr>
<tr>
                                <td class="d3">Sunset: 6:22 pm</td>
                                <td class="d4">Humidity: 84%</td>
                            </tr>
<tr>
                                <td class="d5">UV: 2 (Low)</td>
                                <td class="d6">Pressure: 30.51"</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
Most school and business are closed today. Go make some CoCo or Mocha and play a board game with your kids today. <br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<h4>
<ul>
<li>New to the blog?&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start HERE</a></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Click&nbsp;<a href="http://eepurl.com/OjOcn" target="_blank">HERE to Subscribe</a>&nbsp;by email.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</h4>
<div>
<b><br /></b></div>
<div>
<b>What is YOUR favorite thing about Texas? Comment Below!</b></div>
<div>
<b><br /></b></div>
